name: Weight Watchers Oven"fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the baking potatoes into 3" x 1/2-inch wedges.
2. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. Spray a non-stick baking pan with non-stick spray.
4. In a bowl or on a plate, combine the Parmesan cheese, Paprika, Bacon bits, and Ground white pepper until well mixed.
5. Toss the potato wedges in the seasoned mixture to coat them thoroughly. You can put the coated potatoes in a large plastic bag, press out any excess air, seal the bag, and shake it gently to ensure even coating.
6. Place the potatoes on the prepared baking pan.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes, then carefully turn the potato wedges over using an oven-safe spatula or tongs. Continue baking for another 5-10 minutes until golden brown and crispy.
Diabetic Information:
Per Serving: 92 calories; 4g protein; 2g fat (19.5%); 15g carbohydrate; 116mg sodium; 4mg cholesterol
